patch.value: Metadata governance & coverage observability (missing-field filters, stats breakdowns, validate full-id lists, aggregate explicit labels)

Deliver a cohesive metadata-governance capability built on one shared primitive (core/governance/metadata-coverage). Lets agents find, backfill, aggregate, and track items by metadata completeness.

Closes a cluster of GitHub issues that all share a missing-metadata / coverage / grouping predicate:
- GH-228: pm list --filter-ac-missing/--filter-estimates-missing/--filter-resolution-missing/--filter-metadata-missing
- GH-220: pm update-many same missing-metadata selection filters (bulk backfill)
- GH-218: pm stats lifecycle-state distribution + type adoption metrics
- GH-213: pm stats --by-assignee/--by-tag/--by-priority breakdowns
- GH-219: pm stats --metadata-coverage percentages (AC/estimates/resolution/tags/parent)
- GH-225: pm aggregate --group-by assignee shows explicit (unassigned) label (not blank)
- GH-224: pm validate --all-affected-ids (never truncate ID lists in JSON)

Design: a single dependency-light core module computes missing-metadata predicates, coverage percentages, and grouped lifecycle counts; commands (list/update-many/stats/aggregate/validate) consume it. 100% test coverage of the new core module.

## Implementation (branch feat/metadata-governance-coverage-observability)

**Shared primitive** — `src/core/governance/metadata-coverage.ts` (pure, no IO; injected LifecycleClassifier keeps it testable):
- predicates `isAcMissing`/`isEstimateMissing`/`isResolutionMissing` (resolution scoped to terminal items)
- `filterMissingMetadata` / `itemMatchesMissingMetadata` (specific flags AND, `metadataMissing` = union)
- `computeMetadataCoverage` → per-field present/applicable/percent overall + by_type (resolution denominator = terminal items; percent=100 when applicable=0)
- `groupItemsByDimension` → lifecycle-bucketed rows with explicit `(unassigned)/(untagged)/(unparented)` labels; tag dimension expands multi-tag items + honors tagPrefix
- `lifecycleClassifierFromStatusRegistry` adapts the runtime status registry (disjoint precedence canceled→closed→blocked→draft→open→in_progress→other)
- 100% covered by tests/unit/core/metadata-coverage.spec.ts (20 cases)

**Command wiring (all consume the one primitive):**
- pm list (GH-228): `--filter-ac-missing/--filter-estimates-missing/--filter-resolution-missing/--filter-metadata-missing` (+singular `--filter-estimate-missing` alias) in applyFilters; echoed in both compact + verbose `filters`. Covers all list* variants via registerListCommand.
- pm update-many (GH-220): same selectors mapped into options.list → reuses runList filtering; hasListFilters updated so rollback rejects them.
- pm stats (GH-213/218/219): `--metadata-coverage` + `--by-assignee/--by-tag [--tag-prefix]/--by-priority`; gated so default stays token-light; by_status/by_type already zero-fill = lifecycle/type distribution.
- pm aggregate (GH-225): new `group_label` per row (explicit empty-group labels; multi-field joins `field=value`).
- pm validate (GH-224): `--all-affected-ids` + JSON-mode auto-untruncation via `fullDiagnostics` (verbose||allAffectedIds||json).

**Full wiring per flag:** commander (register-list-query/register-mutation/register-operations), normalize helpers, cli-contracts FLAG_CONTRACTS + TOOL_LIST_FILTER_OPTION_CONTRACTS + tool-parameter-tables + PM_TOOL_ACTION_SCHEMA_CONTRACTS, MCP server.ts (stats/validate dispatch), completion bash/zsh/fish, docs/COMMANDS.md, contracts golden regenerated.

**Verified in sandbox** (/tmp/pm-mgtest): all five behaviors correct incl validate truncation (human=5/truncated:true, --all-affected-ids + --json = full 7/false).

Metadata governance & coverage observability delivered on one shared primitive: pm list/update-many missing-metadata filters, pm stats coverage % + grouped lifecycle breakdowns, pm aggregate explicit labels, pm validate --all-affected-ids. Closes GH-228/220/218/213/219/225/224. New core module 100% covered; full coverage gate green (S97.75/B91.58/F97.62/L98.01).
